name: Asparagus and Crab Meat Soup - Mang Tay Nau Cua
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Plus 2 teaspoons nuoc mam (Vietnamese fish sauce)
8 oz Fresh or canned lump crab, picked over and drained
2 tablespoons Cornstarch or arrowroot, mixed with 2 tablespoons cold water
15 oz White asparagus spears, cut into 1-inch sections with the canning liquid reserved
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the broth, 1 tablespoon of the fish sauce, sugar, and salt in a 3-quart soup pot. Bring to a boil.
2. Reduce heat and simmer. Meanwhile, heat oil in a skillet.
3. Add shallots and garlic; stir-fry until aromatic.
4. Add crab meat, remaining fish sauce, and black pepper. Stir-fry over high heat for 1 minute.
5. Set aside the crab mixture.
6. Bring soup to a boil. Add cornstarch mixture and stir gently until thickened and clear.
7. While boiling, add egg and stir gently. Continue stirring for about 1 minute.
8. Add crab meat mixture and asparagus with canning liquid; cook gently until heated through.
9. Transfer soup to a heated tureen. Sprinkle coriander, scallion, and freshly ground black pepper on top.
